mapper.select: select id , text,orgNo,sort ,iconCls,type from ( SELECT org.id, org.org_abr as text,org.org_no as orgNo,org.sort as sort,null as iconCls,'0' as type FROM jsh_organization org WHERE org.org_parent_no = #{orgNo} and COALESCE(org.org_stcd,'0') !='5' union all select u.id,u.username as text, null as orgNo,rel.user_blng_orga_dspl_seq as sort,'icon-user' as iconCls,'1' as type from jsh_user u,jsh_orga_user_rel rel where 1=1 and u.id=rel.user_id and rel.orga_id=#{orgId} and COALESCE(rel.delete_flag,'0') !='1' and u.status = 0 and COALESCE(u.delete_flag,'0') !='1' ) node order by sort asc
SELECT id, org_abr as text,org_no as orgNo,'0' as type FROM jsh_organization WHERE org_parent_no = -1 and COALESCE(org_stcd,'0') !='5' order by sort asc
mapper.update: update jsh_user set status='2' where tenant_id=#{tenantId} and id!=#{tenantId}
mapper.select: select u.* from jsh_user u where u.weixin_open_id = #{weixinOpenId} and u.status=0 and COALESCE(u.delete_flag,'0') !='1'
